nasb.text: and coming out of the tombs after His resurrection they entered the holy city and appeared to many.

esv.text: and coming out of the tombs after his resurrection they went into the holy city and appeared to many.

cnv.text: 從墳墓裡出來；到了耶穌復活之後，他們進到聖城向許多人顯現。

ccb.text: 他们在耶稣复活后离开坟墓，进圣城向许多人显现。

csbs.text: 耶稣复活以后，他们从坟墓里出来，进了圣城，向许多人显现。
